notes: Most models performed very well on this hand-drawn diagram with clear labels. The qwen3.6 family and glm-4.6v-flash-9b led by correctly identifying the gray pencil body outline, blue ink text, and exact color coding. The most common error was misidentifying the gray pencil outline as black ink (gemma variants, some qwen3.5). Almost all models missed the two specific grey smudges mentioned in ground truth; qwen3.5-9b|nothink and qwen3.6-27b|nothink were the only ones to attempt smudge descriptions. qwen3.5-4b|nothink appeared to be truncated mid-sentence at the end ('idea').
